name: Officer Sara Wilkowski
description:
[Art by PzKpfwl]
Hiiiii My KR Besties! We now go to the wild, Untamed! Downright Lovecraftian lands of...Poland!

New Kaiserreich bot YIPIIEEE

A short break from North America.

The Next two bots will be in Murica since I intend to finish my business with that god-forsaken continent and look forward to other God-forsaken continents!
creator: ZekkeTheSequel
